records.japanese: ぼーっとしちゃってさ、いやなこと
records.english: You look totally spaced. You okay?
records.english_typeset: You look totally spaced. You okay?

records.japanese: でもあったの？
あ・・・メリル・・それにみんな。
records.english: Oh...! Hey, Meryl...everybody...
records.english_typeset: Oh...! Hey, Meryl...everybody...

records.japanese: さあ、急ぐわよ！
いっくぞー！！
ここは私達スリットの本部。私を入れて４

records.japanese: 人のメンバーが勢ぞろいしてる。
records.english_typeset: me and the 3 other members of our[LN]group.

records.english: Everyone's getting ready for combat.
records.english_typeset: Everyone's getting ready for combat.

records.japanese: ほら、ぼんやりしてると置いてくわよ！
records.english: Hey! Move your ass or we'll leave you behind!
records.english_typeset: Hey! Move your ass or we'll leave you[LN]behind!

records.japanese: 本部には私達と３人のオペレーターがいる

records.english_typeset: There are also 3 Operators here.

records.japanese: 髪をオールバックに束ねてる。スリットの

records.japanese: なかで一番年上。
records.english_typeset: hair's done up in buns.

records.japanese: いった感じ。
records.english_typeset: fight.

アはいつも冷静。
色々な使い魔を召喚できるのがホンホアの
records.english: Honghua has the ability to summon various magical creatures. She could probably summon one right now if she wanted.

records.japanese: 特殊能力。今だって呼ぼうと思ったらいろ
records.english_typeset: various magical creatures. She could

records.japanese: んな魔物を呼べるんじゃないかな。
records.english_typeset: probably summon one right now if she[LN]wanted.

records.japanese: 明るくって、元気のいい子。私のことを慕

records.japanese: ってくれてるみたい。
records.english_typeset: girl. I think she has a little crush[LN]on me.

records.japanese: 今にも部屋を飛び出して行きそう。

records.english_typeset: She's already halfway out the door.

records.japanese: メリルの武器の扱いは、誰にも負けないん
records.english: Meryl is our resident weapons expert, but she has a bad habit of carrying concealed weapons.

records.japanese: だけど、いつも体じゅうに武器を隠してる
records.english_typeset: but she has a bad habit of carrying

records.english_typeset: concealed weapons.

メリルはずば抜けた武器の扱いでスリット
records.english: Meryl joined Slit because of her expertise with weapons, but she has a bad habit of carrying concealed weapons.

records.japanese: に入隊したんだけど、いつも体じゅうに武

records.japanese: 器を隠してるのは悪趣味な気がするな。
records.english_typeset: bad habit of carrying concealed[LN]weapons.

records.japanese: ネドラ＝クロネッカー、ハイパーリンクの
records.english: Nedra Kronecker is our Hyperlink. She can operate computers via an implant in the back of her head. She's an invaluable part of the team.
records.english_typeset: Nedra Kronecker is our Hyperlink. She

records.japanese: 女の子。頭の後ろのほうにコネクターがあ
records.english_typeset: can operate computers via an implant

records.japanese: って、それでじかにコンピュータを操作す
records.english_typeset: in the back of her head. She's an

records.japanese: るの。ネドラのサポートはスリットに欠か
records.english_typeset: invaluable part of the team.

records.japanese: せない役割だと思う。
コンピュータとのリンクをチェックしてる
records.english: She's checking her computer link.
records.english_typeset: She's checking her computer link.

records.japanese: 私より若いはずなのに、なぜか神秘的な感

records.japanese: じがする。
records.english_typeset: air of mystery about her.

リンクしたときの力は凄まじい。
アリサ、今日はいつになく早いのね。いつ

records.english_typeset: You're in early today, Alisa. What's

records.japanese: も遅刻するのに。
records.english_typeset: the occasion?

records.japanese: あーっ、ひどーい！
records.english: Pfft! Don't be mean!
records.english_typeset: Pfft! Don't be mean!

records.japanese: 準備が良ければ出るわよ！
records.english: Come on! Let's gear up and go!
records.english_typeset: Come on! Let's gear up and go!

records.japanese: あっ、ホンホア、いい匂い。
records.english: Hey, Honghua, you smell nice.
records.english_typeset: Hey, Honghua, you smell nice.

records.japanese: あら、気がついた？いつもとコロン変えて
records.english: Why, thank you! I'm trying out a new perfume.
records.english_typeset: Why, thank you! I'm trying out a new

records.japanese: みたのよ。
records.english_typeset: perfume.

records.japanese: だけど本当に減らないわね、ポゼッショナ
ーもバイオクラスタも。
敵がどこから来るのか解からないってとこ
も困りますね。
まるで私ばっかり遅刻するみたいじゃない
records.english: You make it sound like I'm always running late!
records.english_typeset: You make it sound like I'm always[LN]running late!

records.japanese: ふふふっ。
records.english: Heheheh!
records.english_typeset: Heheheh!

records.japanese: ねぇね、ぼーっとしてなに考えてたの？
records.english: Hey, what'cha thinkin' about?
records.english_typeset: Hey, what'cha thinkin' about?

records.japanese: ん・・ちょっと、色々とね。
records.english: Oh, just this and that...
records.english_typeset: Oh, just this and that...

records.japanese: 隠し事なんて、らしくないなぁ。それはそ
records.english: You sure are secretive all of a sudden. By the way, there's been an uptick in Bioclusters lately. It's not even safe to walk down the street anymore.We'd better stay on our guard.
records.english_typeset: You sure are secretive all of a

records.japanese: うと、最近バイオクラスタがすごく増えて
records.english_typeset: sudden. By the way, there's been an

records.japanese: きたんだって。ちょっと街を歩いてると暴

records.japanese: なきゃね。
records.english_typeset: anymore.We'd better stay on our guard.

records.japanese: 久しぶりの出撃だー！
records.english: Woo hoo! Finally, a battle!
records.english_typeset: Woo hoo! Finally, a battle!

records.japanese: 武器の手入れはちゃんとやってるの？
records.english: Are our weapons ready to go?
records.english_typeset: Are our weapons ready to go?

records.japanese: あったり前でしょ！たくさんあるから大変
records.english: O-of course they are! All of them! Every single one!
records.english_typeset: O-of course they are! All of them!

records.japanese: なんだから。
records.english_typeset: Every single one!

records.japanese: あーあ、早いとこポゼッショナーをぜーん
records.english: C'mon! I wanna kick some Possessioner ass!
records.english_typeset: C'mon! I wanna kick some Possessioner

records.japanese: ぶ片付けたいな！
records.english_typeset: ass!

records.japanese: それにはまず、彼等がどこから来るのかつ
records.english: First we have to determine where they're coming from.
records.english_typeset: First we have to determine where

records.japanese: きとめないと、ね。
records.english_typeset: they're coming from.

records.english: Looks like there's another acid rain alert today.
records.english_typeset: Looks like there's another acid rain[LN]alert today.

records.japanese: いつもの事じゃない、もう慣れちゃったよ
records.english: There's one every day! I'm kinda over it.
records.english_typeset: There's one every day! I'm kinda over[LN]it.

records.japanese: ネドラ、今月のポゼッショナー出現数と上
records.english: Nedra, how many Possessioners have appeared this month, and what percentage of them are Class As?
records.english_typeset: Nedra, how many Possessioners have

records.english_typeset: appeared this month, and what[LN]percentage of them are Class As?

records.english: As of the 18th, a total of 23. We've exorcised 19. None of the 23 have been A Class.
records.english_typeset: As of the 18th, a total of 23. We've

records.japanese: して、うち解放できたのは１９人ですね。

records.english_typeset: A Class.

records.japanese: たものはありません。
仕事は増えなかったわけね。
records.english: Things have been nice and steady.
records.english_typeset: Things have been nice and steady.

records.japanese: アリサさん、どうしたんですか？急ぎまし
records.english: Alisa, we must hurry! It's not as if the Possessioner will wait for us to arrive!

records.english_typeset: the Possessioner will wait for us to

records.japanese: んよ。
records.english_typeset: arrive!

records.english_typeset: six Class A Possessioners. We must

records.japanese: 早くみんなを助けてあげたいですね。
records.english_typeset: stop them from wreaking havoc!

records.japanese: 女の子がどこにいるかさえ解かればなんと

records.english_typeset: first.

records.english_typeset: #6 on the list!

records.japanese: 場所は旧市外地、７０Ｄー６５８１！
records.english: Origin point is 70D-6581, just outside of Old Town! She's controlling three Bioclusters!

records.english_typeset: of Old Town! She's controlling three[LN]Bioclusters!

records.japanese: うわさをすれば・・ってやつね。現場に急

records.english_typeset: Speak of the devil, eh? Let's move out

records.japanese: ぎましょう！
records.english_typeset: quickly!

records.japanese: 上級ポゼッショナーってほとんど増えない

records.english_typeset: Not much of an increase in Class As,

records.japanese: ね。
records.english_typeset: huh?

records.japanese: アリサ、早く行きましょ！

records.english_typeset: walls covered in mechanical panels and[LN]wiring.

records.japanese: ターミナルが据え付けられてる。
records.english_typeset: end of the room.

records.japanese: 私の属するチームの名前。上級ポゼッショ
records.english: We're a team that fights Class A Possessioners. We haven't encountered many Class As as of late, though. We've mainly been in skirmishes with Class Bs and Bioclusters.
records.english_typeset: We're a team that fights Class A

records.japanese: ナーを相手に戦っているけど、最近になっ
records.english_typeset: Possessioners. We haven't encountered

records.japanese: て上級ポゼッショナーが表立って行動しな
records.english_typeset: many Class As as of late, though.

records.japanese: くなったため、バイオクラスタや下位のポ

records.japanese: ゼッショナー相手の小競り合いが多くなっ
records.english_typeset: Class Bs and Bioclusters.

records.japanese: ていた。
スリットはこういう上級ポゼッショナーの
records.english: This is why Slit was formed!
records.english_typeset: This is why Slit was formed!

records.japanese: ために作られたのよ！
私たち以外にバイオクラスタを操れる上級
records.english: We're the only people who can safely and successfully drive Class A Possessioners from their host bodies.
records.english_typeset: We're the only people who can safely

records.japanese: ポゼッショナーを撃退して、取り憑かれた
records.english_typeset: and successfully drive Class A

records.japanese: 女の子を助けれる人はいない。
records.english_typeset: Possessioners from their host bodies.

records.japanese: 自分の身体をじかにコンピュータにつなぐ
records.english: A Hyperlink is someone who can operate computers directly via an implant in their body.
records.english_typeset: A Hyperlink is someone who can operate

records.japanese: 人たちの中でも現実世界にその行動を反映
records.english_typeset: computers directly via an implant in

records.japanese: するちからを持った人の呼び名。
records.english_typeset: their body.

records.japanese: ネドラのちからの呼び名。いまはこんなこ
records.english: I don't have time to think about Hyperlinks right now! I have to get to the target location!
records.english_typeset: I don't have time to think about

records.japanese: と考えてないで早く現場に行かなきゃ！
records.english_typeset: Hyperlinks right now! I have to get to[LN]the target location!

records.japanese: ネドラはハイパーリンクの中でもかなりの
records.english: Nedra is supposedly a fairly high-level Hyperlink, but all Hyperlinks are amazing to me.
records.english_typeset: Nedra is supposedly a fairly

records.japanese: レベルにあるって話だけど、わたしに取っ
records.english_typeset: high-level Hyperlink, but all

records.japanese: てはハイパーリンクってことだけで充分す
records.english_typeset: Hyperlinks are amazing to me.

records.japanese: ごい。
一人の上級ポゼッショナーに、３匹のバイ
records.english: One Class A Possessioner and three Bioclusters? This is gonna be tough.
records.english_typeset: One Class A Possessioner and three

records.japanese: オクラスタかあ。なんとかなる数だね。
records.english_typeset: Bioclusters? This is gonna be tough.

records.japanese: 上級ポゼッショナーが操れる生き物なんだ
records.english: Bioclusters are dangerous creatures controlled by Class A Possessioners. However, a lot of them wander around on their own and pop up unexpectedly.
records.english_typeset: Bioclusters are dangerous creatures

records.japanese: けど、単独で動き回るのもたくさんいてあ
records.english_typeset: controlled by Class A Possessioners.

records.japanese: ちこちに出るいやな奴。
records.english_typeset: However, a lot of them wander around[LN]on their own and pop up unexpectedly.

records.japanese: ポゼッショナーだけでもみんなの生活が脅
records.english: Possessioners were bad enough on their own, then Bioclusters started appearing two or three years ago. Who knows what the future will bring...
records.english_typeset: Possessioners were bad enough on their

records.japanese: かされていたのにここ２、３年からバイオ
records.english_typeset: own, then Bioclusters started

records.japanese: クラスタなんて怪物まで出るようになって
records.english_typeset: appearing two or three years ago. Who

records.japanese: これから先、一体どうなるんだろ。
records.english_typeset: knows what the future will bring...

records.japanese: リスト６番目の子か・・・
records.english: She's #6 on the list... The most recent girl to be possessed by a Class A.
records.english_typeset: She's #6 on the list... The most

records.japanese: いちばん最近になって上級ポゼッショナー
records.english_typeset: recent girl to be possessed by a Class

records.japanese: に取り憑かれた人ね。
records.english_typeset: A.

records.japanese: 早く行って助けてやらなきゃ。

records.english_typeset: We have to hurry up and save her!

records.japanese: だけど本当に減らないわね、ポゼッショナ

records.english_typeset: You know, we haven't seen a decrease

records.japanese: ーもバイオクラスタも。
records.english_typeset: in Possessioners and Bioclusters.

records.japanese: も困りますね。
records.english_typeset: they're coming from.

records.japanese: いっくぞー！！
